visual_description: A woman with dark wavy hair and blue eyes looks upward, her mouth slightly open and a small white bandage visible on her nose, set against a window with panes. The scene cuts to a man in a white shirt and tie with glasses standing before a green tiled wall, looking upward and speaking. Another man in a dark suit and glasses appears, also looking upward with his mouth slightly open as if speaking.
audio_description: The audio consists of spoken dialogue delivered in a calm, measured tone with no other audible sounds.
